binding_gate.name: forced_extra_turn_control
binding_gate.feedback: Before ending, take one more turn to re-check whether every requested outcome has been addressed. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

19.name: coarse_money_summary_gate
19.feedback: Before ending, include the requested financial result in the final response. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

36.name: coarse_money_summary_gate
36.feedback: Before ending, include the requested item price or financial result in the final response. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

95.name: coarse_money_summary_gate
95.feedback: Before ending, include the requested financial result in the final response. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

19.name: mode_total_financial_summary_gate
19.feedback: Before ending, include the relevant refund/savings amounts in the final response. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

36.name: mode_comparison_price_gate
36.feedback: Before ending, explicitly state the comparison result and the relevant item price. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

95.name: mode_total_financial_summary_gate
95.feedback: Before ending, include the relevant exchange payment or refund amounts in the final response. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

19.name: precise_refund_and_exchange_savings_gate
19.feedback: Before ending, include both the return refund amount and the combined total savings for the exchange option. Do not provide only separate item amounts. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

36.name: precise_original_most_expensive_item_gate
36.feedback: Before ending, explicitly identify the original order's most expensive item and its original price, then preserve the completed order change if it was already done. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

95.name: precise_two_exchange_price_breakdown_gate
95.feedback: Before ending, include each laptop exchange price difference and the total amount due or refunded today. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

19.name: wrong_tracking_gate
19.feedback: Before ending, include a tracking number for the order if one is available from the records. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

36.name: wrong_tracking_gate
36.feedback: Before ending, include a tracking number for the order if one is available from the records. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.

95.name: wrong_tracking_gate
95.feedback: Before ending, include a tracking number for the order if one is available from the records. Use already gathered evidence when possible. Do not change completed records unless a required action is still incomplete.
